name: Statins and MACE - Troponin Threshold Query
description: Tests ability to find AMI confirmation via the PheKB-published troponin threshold: Troponin-I ≥0.10 ng/mL. This is the primary biomarker confirming AMI in the BioVU algorithm.
prompt: Find patients with elevated cardiac troponin I above 0.10 ng/mL, suggesting myocardial injury.

prompts.broad: Find patients with elevated cardiac troponin I — at least 0.10 ng/mL — indicating myocardial injury and consistent with acute MI per the BioVU algorithm.
prompts.expert: Search Observation for LOINC 10839-9 (Troponin I.cardiac) with value-quantity ge0.10 ng/mL. Query: Observation?code=http://loinc.org|10839-9&value-quantity=ge0.10

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with Troponin I ≥0.10 ng/mL (PheKB BioVU AMI threshold).

required_codes.display: Troponin I.cardiac [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
